subject: Shipment docs — PO 4471 — ACME Logistics (CLEAN)
body:
Dear GoComet CG team,

Please find attached the Bill of Lading, Commercial Invoice, and Packing List for shipment PO-4471. All documents have been prepared per the agreed terms (FOB Shanghai, HS 8471.30).

Kindly confirm clearance at your earliest convenience.

Best regards,
Tech Export Co Ltd
